text:
Once upon a time, there was a magical tree that bloomed an endless array of feathers. Anyone who embraced a feather would gain extraordinary insight into the nature of dreams. One day, a young girl named Lily wandered into the woods. Her eyes gleamed with curiosity. She reached out and picked up a shimmering plumey thing.

That night, as Lily whispered wishes into the feather, her dreams were illuminated with visions of beautiful cities under twinkling stars. She dreamed she could fly higher than birds, visit realms unseen, and understand the hearts of all living things.

The next day, Lily returned to the tree. Holding the feather close, she murmured about her wish to fly just like the dreams. Moments later, a gentle gust swept her into the air, leaving her amazed and humming softly about her newfound wonder. She shared her stories with her friends, sparking curiosity and a quest to experience what she'd dreamt about.
